title: lyonia stahlii var. costata
intro: Lyonia stahlii var. costata, also known as the Costate Lyonia, is a shrub species in the heath family (Ericaceae). It is a plant that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lyonia stahlii var. costata include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea or decoction for herbal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
